The Grant Search features does not sort the grants properly     	 The grants list generated with the Grant Search feature is sorted by Request Number (Grant ID). Since grants closed prior to the implementation of GBS 1 were not converted until 2005, the the list (for long-time grantees) begins with 2000 but after listing 2004 grants jumps back to (for example, in the case of Harvard, 1973). The primary sort for this list should be fiscal year and the secondary sort should be PA Number (not Request Number - when there are multiple grants to an organization in one fiscal year, the grant entered first is not necessarily the one approved first).

Since grants closed prior to the implementation of GBS 1 were not converted until 2005, the the list (for long-time grantees) begins with 2000 but after listing 2004 grants jumps back to (for example, in the case of Harvard, 1973). The primary sort for this list should be fiscal year and the secondary sort should be PA Number (not Request Number - when there are multiple grants to an organization in one fiscal year, the grant entered first is not necessarily the one approved first).
